misc.title: 🚨RUMOR🚨 Strong speculation suggests #BERSERK #ベルセルク Chapter 384 could release in late May 👀 📅 Fans point to a possible Young Animal end-of-month slot (May 22–24 window), matching previous release
misc.text: 🚨RUMOR🚨 Strong speculation suggests #BERSERK #ベルセルク Chapter 384 could release in late May 👀 📅 Fans point to a possible Young Animal end-of-month slot (May 22–24 window), matching previous release patterns. 🔎 No official date yet, but JP insiders hint an announcement could be very close… Guts might be returning sooner than expected ⚔️🔥
